statement: A staged canary ladder (1 -> 4 targets, then recovery drill) is sufficient to de-risk full matrix launch.
rationale: It exercises start/advance/finalize, retries, and safe recovery without high blast radius.
keyAssumptions: observed timing scales roughly with target_count
validationCriteria: all canary stages complete within SLA
no persistent stuck reasons after one auto-heal cycle
critiquePoints: May miss long-tail contention only seen at larger fanout
questions: Should we add an intermediate target_count=10 gate before full launch?
